title: sorghum × drummondii
intro: Sorghum × drummondii, also known as broomcorn or broom sorghum, is a type of grass belonging to the Sorghum genus and is a natural hybrid between Sorghum bicolor and Sorghum halepense. The medicinal properties of Sorghum × drummondii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and help manage blood sugar levels. The herbal preparations of Sorghum × drummondii include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
